notes: 7-phase SOP for agent-native CLI wrapping. E0 effort. Directly applicable to JASON-OS. Review for adoption.
AI-discoverable skill definition with 28 examples. Compare against existing sonash-v0 SKILL.md format. E0 effort.
Python REPL skin with prompt_toolkit. Would need Node/TS port. Pattern more useful than code. E1 effort.
JSON registry powering static discovery site. Good model for skill/tool registry hub. E1 effort.
frozenset-based subprocess arg validation. Similar to existing patterns. E0 effort.
Template-based Jinja2 harness scaffolding. Pattern portable, code tied to CLI-Anything structure. E2 effort.
.claude-plugin/marketplace.json + 5 slash commands. One of first Claude Code plugin configs. E0 effort.
Core concept: skills about HOW to remember. Directly relevant to JASON-OS memory research (T4, T16). E0 — read arXiv 2602.02474.
3-stage: failure mining → analysis+reflection → refinement. Applicable to any self-improving system. E1 effort.
5-section format (Description, Purpose, When to Use, How to Apply, Constraints). 15 examples. Compare against sonash SKILL.md. E0.
18KB failure classification + mutation prompts. Two-stage analysis+reflection. Portable text. E0.
Content + context embeddings per memory item. Concept portable, implementation tied to FAISS+PyTorch. E2.
Usage + reward + EMA tracking for skill selection. Applicable to any tool/skill selection system. E1.
Structured AI agent skill file: setup protocol, experiment loop (keep/discard), NEVER STOP autonomy, crash recovery, TSV logging. Compare against SKILL.md. E0.
Fixed 5-min time budget makes experiments comparable regardless of changes. Single metric (val_bpb). Git branch per run. Generalizable optimization loop. E0.
prepare.py (immutable) + train.py (agent-editable) + program.md (instructions). Clear agent-editable zone contracts. E0.
Agent reads stack trace, attempts fix, reverts if unfixable. Timeout detection. Never-stop semantics. Relevant for GSD executor. E0.
commit/metric/memory/status/description TSV format. Already have JSONL equivalent. Low extraction value. E0.
5 domains directly relevant to JASON-OS: Shell, Git, Database, Search Engine, Programming Language. Deep dives (10-50h each). E2.
35 technology categories as learning path reference. E0.
Standard awesome-list format. Low extraction value. E0.
